'''Vahaba''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Vahaba system/Legends|Vahaba system]], [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Vahaba asteroid belt]]. The [[Ore/Legends|ores]] found in the belt formed the backbone of the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] economy.

{{Star-stub}}
